title: hymenocallis guatemalensis
intro: Hymenocallis guatemalensis, commonly known as the Mexican Spider Lily or Guatemalan Spider Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
